results.description:
YieldManagerAave.distributeYieldForTreasuryAndReturnMarketAllocation(uint256,uint256) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#179-204) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- totalRealized == totalHeld (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#189)

Reentrancy in YieldManagerAave.removePaymentTokenFromMarket(uint256) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#149-155):
	External calls:
	- lendingPool.withdraw(address(paymentToken),amount,address(this)) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#150-154)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- amountReservedInCaseOfInsufficientAaveLiquidity += amount (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#153)
results.markdown:
Reentrancy in [YieldManagerAave.removePaymentTokenFromMarket(uint256)](contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#L149-L155):
	External calls:
	- [lendingPool.withdraw(address(paymentToken),amount,address(this))](contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#L150-L154)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [amountReservedInCaseOfInsufficientAaveLiquidity += amount](contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#L153)

results.description:
Reentrancy in YieldManagerAave.transferPaymentTokensToUser(address,uint256) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#131-143):
	External calls:
	- transferSuccess = paymentToken.transfer(user,amount) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#132-137)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- amountReservedInCaseOfInsufficientAaveLiquidity -= amount (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#139)

results.description:
Reentrancy in YieldManagerAave.claimAaveRewardsToTreasury() (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#161-170):
	External calls:
	- IAaveIncentivesController(aaveIncentivesController).claimRewards(rewardsDepositedAssets,amount,treasury) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#167)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- ClaimAaveRewardTokenToTreasury(amount) (contracts/YieldManagerAave.sol#169)

Version constraint 0.8.3 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory.
